module.name: require-test-description-style
module.description: Enforce that test descriptions start with "should".

scenarios.name: should allow a test description starting with 'should'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the it call

scenarios.name: should allow a test block description starting with 'should'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the test call

scenarios.name: should report an it() description not starting with 'should'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the it call

scenarios.name: should report a test() description not starting with 'should'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the test call
